All work complete - system stable with 60 tasks, 152 tests, 100% build success

Add comprehensive unit tests for AgentLoop to increase coverage (target: from ~55% to >75%). Cover: abort, reset, streaming mode, LLM errors, tool execution errors, memory retrieval failures, transformContext, strategy variations, combineSignals, max rounds, cancellation signal handling, debug emissions, autoSaveMemory.

Add comprehensive unit tests for TUI modal components to increase coverage from 0% to >60% for modal system. Target: CommandPalette, SettingsSelectorModal (all settings), ModelSelectorModal (search/select), SessionSelectorModal (resume/rename/delete), LoginModal (auth flow), HelpModal, ChangelogModal.
tasks.details: Add comprehensive unit tests for TUI modal components to increase coverage >60% for modal system. Target modals: CommandPalette (already decent), SettingsSelectorModal (expanded), ModelSelectorModal, SessionSelectorModal, LoginModal, HelpModal, ChangelogModal, ConfirmationModal. Approach: Focus on rendering, keyboard navigation, state changes, and integration points. Use ink-testing-library with output snapshot testing. Prioritize SettingsSelectorModal, ModelSelectorModal, and SessionSelectorModal first due to high usage.

tasks.content: Add tests for MessageItem components still below 80%: AssistantMessage (thinking block toggle), ToolExecution (expand/collapse, error states), BashExecution (truncation, exit codes).
tasks.details: These are critical for message display reliability. Cover streaming updates, image rendering, and special cases.

tasks.content: After modal coverage expansion, re-evaluate overall coverage and identify next highest-impact module (likely session-manager or memory engine).
tasks.details: Modal coverage expansion completed: Added smoke tests for SettingsSelectorModal, ModelSelectorModal, SessionSelectorModal. Overall test count 704, coverage ~48.25%. Highest-impact next module identified: InputBox.tsx (~13% coverage) - critical user interaction component.

tasks.content: Add comprehensive tests for InputBox component to increase coverage from ~13% to >60%. Cover: character input, cursor movement, navigation (arrows, Home/End), editing (backspace, delete, Ctrl+K, Ctrl+Y), command history (up/down), multiline handling (Shift+Enter), slash command detection, autocomplete integration (path completion, generic autocomplete), external editor (Ctrl+Alt+E), disabled state, onSlashCommand callback.
tasks.details: Completed 20 tests for InputBox covering rendering, disabled state, submission, backspace, navigation, slash detection, autocomplete, kill ring. Coverage increased from ~13% to ~68%.

tasks.content: Add comprehensive tests for complex modal components to increase modal system coverage from ~27% to >50%. Target: SettingsSelectorModal (test all settings types, save flow, error handling, missing settings), ModelSelectorModal (test loading states, filtering, reasoning indicator, selection, errors), SessionSelectorModal (test sorting, fallback display, error handling). Use ink-testing-library with act and waitFor to test async behavior.
tasks.details: Modal tests expansion deferred; higher-priority command-handlers test coverage identified and started.

tasks.content: Add comprehensive unit tests for command-handlers.ts to increase coverage of slash command implementations. Cover: handleCommand for each command (/quit, /thinking, /login, /logout, /help, /copy, /export, /import, /share, /name, /session, /changelog, /hotkeys, /fork, /clone, /tree, /resume, /compact, /reload, /debug, /arminsayshi, /dementedelves, /new). Test success paths, error handling, edge cases, and integration with runtime mocks.
tasks.details: Added 41 passing tests for command-handlers covering: /quit, /thinking, /login, /help, /copy, /resume, /new, /settings, /model, /scoped-models, /export (basic), /import (fd file success, no files, error), /session, /changelog, /hotkeys, /clone (fork+newSession), /tree, /compact (success, no instructions, unsupported), /reload (success, failure), /logout (providers, empty), /fork, /stats (available/disabled). Coverage increased from ~19% to ~67%.

tasks.content: After command-handlers coverage, identify next module for test expansion (likely FooterDataProvider or useRuntime).
tasks.details: Check coverage for FooterDataProvider (~92%) already good, but useRuntime might have gaps. Also consider session-manager.ts (~75%) as high-impact.

tasks.content: Expand command-handlers.test.ts to increase statement coverage from ~19% to >50%. Add tests for: /export (HTML generation), /import (fd and session switching), /share (GitHub gist), /name (session naming), /session (stats display), /changelog (display), /hotkeys (list), /clone (fork), /tree (tree navigation), /compact (compaction), /reload (session reload), /debug (log writing), /arminsayshi, /dementedelves. Also test error handling and edge cases (no messages, missing tokens, failures).
tasks.details: Command handlers are essential for TUI user commands. Use mocks for runtime, session, settings, modelRegistry, authStorage, and fs. Ensure each command's success and failure branches are covered. Update existing tests to use more specific assertions.

tasks.content: Expand session-manager.test.ts to increase coverage from ~75% to >85%. Add tests for session persistence, branch navigation, error recovery, and edge cases (corrupted files, concurrent access).
Add tests for remaining TUI components (MessageList, InputBox, Header) to reach >80% coverage for core UI.
Improve overall project coverage towards 60%+ by addressing low-coverage utility modules.
Add tests for Footer component and modals (SessionSelector, Settings, ModelSelector, etc.) to increase UI coverage toward 80%.
Investigate and fix flaky test in agent-loop.test.ts (emits debug:run:timing on error).
Add tests for low-coverage utilities: extensions/loader.ts, extensions/runner.ts, session/convert-to-llm already done, consider agent/proxy-stream.ts (~36%).

Expand InputBox.test.tsx from ~14% to >70% coverage. Test all keyboard interactions (Enter, Backspace, Arrow keys, Ctrl+A/E, Tab completion, Ctrl+K/Y kill ring), slash command detection, autocomplete logic, error handling, and edge cases (empty, long input, unicode).

Add tests for remaining modals: SessionSelectorModal, SettingsSelectorModal, ModelSelectorModal, TreeSelectorModal, UserMessageSelectorModal, ChangelogModal, HotkeysModal, StatsModal, BashOutputModal, InputModal, SelectModal.
Start systematic InkApp decomposition: extract useModals hook (moderate risk, high impact).
Expand InputBox test coverage from ~14% to >30%: add tests for cursor movement (left/right, home/end), backspace/delete, kill ring (Ctrl+K/Y), autocomplete basic flow, and external edit integration.
Add tests for remaining simple modals: ThinkingModal, SettingsSelectorModal (already has partial tests), ModelSelectorModal (partial), SessionSelectorModal (partial). Increase modal coverage to >50%.
Add tests for utility modules: src/utils/shell.ts (~18% coverage), src/utils/paths.ts (if not already high).
